description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image for the lint, test, and build stages, with a global before_script that runs npm install --silent and a cache of node_modules/. Define stages lint, test, build, and deploy. In the lint stage add a lint job that echoes \"Running Linter\" then runs npm run lint. In the test stage add a test job that echoes \"Running Tests\" then runs npm test. In the build stage add a build job that echoes \"Building the App\" then runs npm run build, and always uses the node_modules/ cache. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the ruby:latest image, runs apt-get -qq update, installs ruby and dpl, then executes dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the deploy branch.
